content.en:
"Lord of the Ruins, this is the trouble you have provoked!"

Ye Tian appeared.

"Six Bone Transformation Realms!"

The Lord of the Ruins rejoices.

He knew that Ye Tian was an primordial-level genius, an ancient-level genius of the sixth-time Bone Transformation Realm, and it was definitely comparable to the top seventh-time Bone Transformation Realm Breaking Genius!

And the bone transformation realm sent by the Blood Kun Clan this time, the most powerful one was the boundary-breaking genius of the seventh bone transformation realm.

It is enough to be able to stop this crisis!

As for after this crisis, he didn't think about it that much, and it was useless to think about it so much.

Whoa!!

The Lord of Quantum and the other Bone Transformation Realm of the Blood Kun Clan descended here.

And that eternal demarcation pillar also came, fixing the origin of the boundary rift in the territorial waters, so that they could exert their full strength.

"Lord of the Ruins, I've found you!"

The Lord of Quantum said coldly.

Immediately, his gaze looked at Ye Tian.

He could feel that Ye Tian's strength should be very strong, and he had no fear in the face of him.

And the Lord of the Ruins is full of fear.

From this, it can be seen that Ye Tian is likely to be an ancient genius of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm.

If this was really the case, he really couldn't defeat Ye Tian.

Thereupon.

The Lord of Quantum said, "I am the Lord of Quantum from the Blood Kun Clan, Your Excellency should be the most powerful bone transformation realm in the territorial sea realm, it is best to leave this matter alone." "

"Blood Kun Clan, what's the matter, leave the territorial sea boundary crack!"

Ye Tian drove away.

The Lord of Quantum frowned, Ye Tian didn't even give face to the Blood Kun Clan.

The first possibility is that Ye Tian doesn't take the Blood Kun Clan in his eyes, and the second possibility is that he doesn't know the strength of the Blood Kun Clan!

He felt that Ye Tian should be the second type!

After all, it is just a weak multi-void world from the territorial sea boundary rift, and it is normal that the bone transformation realm inside has no knowledge.

Swish!

Quantum took the initiative, and he grabbed the Lord of the Ruins directly.

Bang!!!!

A vast expanse of time and space was like a bubble in the hands of the Lord of Quantum, and he grasped it in his hands.

The Lord of the Ruins was overturned, as if he had no power to resist.

He tried to shuttle, but no matter how he shuttled, there was no way to leave.

This is the huge gap in strength!

"Who gave you the courage to do it in front of me?"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and time and space froze.

The next moment.

The time and space where the Lord of Quantum was located was grabbed by Ye Tianyi, shrunk into a ball, and was caught in his hand.

The faces of the other bone transformation realms of the Blood Kun Clan changed drastically one by one, and they couldn't believe it at all!

The Lord of Quantum is a boundary-breaking genius of the seventh-time bone transformation realm, even if Ye Tian is an ancient-level genius of the sixth-stage bone transformation realm, it is impossible to grasp the master of Quantum in his hands like an ant!

What a terrifying feat!

"It could be an ancient-level genius of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm!"

They guessed.

The strength is not as good, they are cowardly, and they dare not make a move.

"Your Excellency, our Blood Kun Clan is a Blood Transformation Realm race with nine bone transformation realms!"

Quantum's Lord Road.

"I know the Blood Kun Clan!" Ye Tian said lightly.

In this area of the land of eternity, in addition to the four top forces such as Gu Heng Mountain, there are also many powerful forces, and the Blood Kun Clan is one of them, whose strength is equivalent to that of the Eternal Blood Bird Clan, with the existence of nine bone transformation realms.

Therefore, the Blood Kun Clan is usually very arrogant.

Ye Tian didn't kill the Blood Kun Clan immediately, and he didn't want to make trouble for the territorial sea boundary gap.

He can kill the Blood Kun Clan, and then reveal his identity, and the Blood Kun Clan will never dare to attack him.

However, in this way, if you enter the territorial sea boundary rift, you will be in trouble, and you will be targeted by the Blood Kun Clan, or even assassinated.

With his current strength, there is really no way to destroy the Blood Kun Clan, he doesn't have that strength.

When he breaks through to the seventh bone transformation realm or the eighth bone transformation realm, then he can do it.

But not now.

"You know the Blood Kun Clan, why don't you let me go quickly!"

Quantum's Lord Road.

"You inform the strong man of the Blood Kun Clan to come and ransom you!"

Then.

With a wave of his hand, Ye Tian grabbed the other Bone Transformation Realm Blood Kun Clansmen and put away the Eternal Boundary Pillar.

Afterwards.

He directly tore through the barrier of the boundary gap of the territorial sea and came to the land of eternity.

And the Lord of the Ruins is not afraid now, and comes out with him.

Outside the boundary of territorial waters.

The other Blood Kun Clans in the Bone Transformation Realm saw that the Lord of Quantum had been arrested, and notified the Blood Kun Clan headquarters one by one.

And Ye Tian didn't continue to move, but waited here.

Time passes slowly.

Then.

The Lord of the Ruins said: "Lord of Endless, we really have to wait for the Blood Kun Clan to send a strong man over???"

He was a little worried.

Although Ye Tian had just shown his incomparably terrifying strength, his opponent was the Blood Kun Clan after all!

Isn't that careful?

But Ye Tian didn't seem to be worried about anything.

"Lord of the Ruins, if you are worried, you can leave the territorial sea boundary and escape!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"How could I escape!"

The Lord of the Ruins smiled awkwardly.

He was the one who caused this, and he felt that if he dared to escape, the Endless Lord might slap him to death.

But until now, he was a little incredulous that Ye Tian's strength had become so strong now.

He remembered that when he left, although the strength of the Endless Lord had improved rapidly, it was not comparable to him, so he didn't care too much, he only knew that there was the Endless Lord's bone transformation realm.

But now.

Compared to the Endless Lord, his strength is simply an ant!

Then.

The Lord of Quantum was still shouting, "Lord of Endless, you'd better let me go now, otherwise you'll be in trouble when the powerhouses of our Blood Kun Clan arrive." "

Syllable!

An invisible slap landed on Lord Quantum's face, making his flesh feel like it was about to crack.

See here.

The Lord of Quantum was stunned and did not dare to speak again.

He was afraid that he would really anger Ye Tian, so he killed him directly, and the strong man of the Blood Kun Clan couldn't save him when he came!

Time passes slowly.

Finally.

In the distant void of the land of eternity, a huge blood kun appeared.

Rumble!!!!!

An overwhelming array of blood has descended.

Its terrifying aura was transmitted directly, causing the Lord of the Ruins to change his face.

The Lord of the Ruins only knew that the Blood Kun Clan was very powerful, but he didn't know how powerful it was.

Now, the strength of each of these blood kun is above him, and the aura of some of them is enough to crush him countless times just by leaking a slight!

"This ......"

The Lord of the Ruins shuddered.

He felt that Ye Tian had underestimated the Blood Kun clan, this time they were all finished, and the territorial sea boundary gap was also finished.
